title: Semantic Content, Forms, and Tables Checkpoint
description: Retrieval practice for this chapter. Explanations appear after submission.

questions.question: Which element represents self-contained reusable content?
questions.explanation: An article should make sense independently or in another context.

questions.question: What connects a label to a form control?
questions.explanation: A label for value matches its control id.

questions.question: Why must radio controls in one question share a name?

options.text: So only one choice is selected and submitted as one field

questions.explanation: Shared names create one mutually exclusive form field.
